description: Emitted by T76 FeedItemGenerator after T81 PrivacyGatekeeper approves and item is stored. Triggers T77 FeedScorer.

activityType.description: Type of social activity that generated this item

recipientId.description: Opaque recipient user identifier — no PII

piiGuard: recipientId is opaque. No names, email, or personal content in payload.
privacyNote: T81 PrivacyGatekeeper must approve BEFORE this event is emitted (two-phase: also at delivery in T78).
